summary: Great Philly Spectrum show with strong first set and a smoking Other One, captured on a clear audience‑style recording.
review: The concert is remembered fondly for its energetic first set – highlights include Deal, Hand Jive and a mighty Might As – and an electric second set that builds through Shakedown Street into Spoonful, Drums, Space and a standout The Other One before closing with Comes A Time and Good Lovin'.  Reviewers note the sound was “great,” suggesting a well‑balanced audience recording despite no explicit source details.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers praise the performance and mention good sound quality; limited number of reviews keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listener describes the sound as great despite being a floor‑GA audience tape; no specific dropouts or muddiness reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong, upbeat first set that transitions into a flashing‑lights second set with classic jams; overall pacing described as lively and memorable.

band_member_comments.Phil: Bass highlighted on The Other One.
